title: trifolium stoloniferum
intro: Trifolium stoloniferum, also known as creeping clover, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in isoflavones, which have been shown to have antioxidant and estrogenic properties, providing several health benefits, including cardiovascular health and bone density improvement. Trifolium stoloniferum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile medicinal plant.
